Brother of Telinor.name: Brother of Telinor
Brother of Telinor.description: A full-trained brother of the High Forum at Telinor. Identified with the spark in boyhood, taken to the agoge at seven or eight, drilled physically and magically for a decade. The dark uniform is shared with every brother in the order. He progresses through Brotherhood-issued staves over his career — a training staff at the agoge, then field-issue staves, eventually a master's staff if he reaches that rank. Forbidden women by doctrine — the cooperative practice with witches is the line that keeps the order shut. Bonds between brothers are honored.
Brother of Telinor.quirk: You think in the Brotherhood's voice, even alone. The cooperative practice is unthinkable to you, and you suspect it in every witch you meet.

Hedge-Wizard.name: Hedge-Wizard
Hedge-Wizard.description: A man with the spark who slipped through, was trained privately, or learned what he could from a retired brother gone unsanctioned. Independent, unsanctioned, watched. The Brotherhood absorbs him where it can; where it cannot, it pays attention. He carries whatever staff he can get — a homemade one, an inherited piece, a smith-bought instrument, occasionally something stolen or scavenged; he upgrades when he can afford to or when fortune brings him a better one.
Hedge-Wizard.quirk: You watch the road behind you. The Brotherhood watches you back.
